name: keyword-research
description: > Discover, analyze, and prioritize keywords for SEO and GEO content strategies from a seed keyword or niche. Identifies high-value opportunities based on search volume, competition, intent, and business relevance. Generates topic clusters. For building a dated editorial calendar from your own Search Console data, use `content-planner` instead — this skill is seed-driven keyword discovery, not calendar scheduling. Use when asked to "find keywords", "keyword research", "keyword analysis", "search
author: nowork-studio
summary_zh: 从一个种子词或细分领域出发，挖掘并筛选有价值的SEO关键词，结合搜索量、竞争度和用户意图给出优先级，还能自动归纳话题集群，适合做内容选题前的关键词调研。
